TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: David Arquette kawas tay 1971, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 9, David Arquette, squliq na Bunge'. qnxam na sraral Arquette htgan beh Bentonville Virginiav na Subud.hiya ga squilq na psibay,myagi ru mqwas na sinsiy. Arquette yaba(Cliff Arquette) ga qutux squilq na psibay. hiya yaya ga yutay lamu nya,kahul Poland ngasal. yaba ga Arcouet lalu nya. cipoq kahul French-Canadian ramu.Arquette cyux payat tswe Rosanna ,Richmond,Patricia ru Alexis hga ga squilq na psibay.Arquette yaba ga,cyux maniq iyu. yaya ga mhuqli gang bubu . pincyogan nya Arquette mhtuw cingay ega maki 1990 kawas, Buffy the Vampire Slayer 吸血鬼獵人巴菲(1992),Airheads 空頭(1994) ru Never Been Kissed 從未被親吻(1999). hiya mhtuw Blossom(1992),Beverly Hills,90210 (1992) ru Friends(1996) telivi. 1996 kawas,psibay te qutux ega,mstnaq 未來 bes nya Courteney Cox .hiya ga kekong maki 1999 kawas.msqun mhtuw k'ko k'l' 廣告 maki 2003 kawas. ru 成立 kosi,qani kosi maki cingay ega ru telivi.ru Daisy Does Amerika,Dirt ru Cougar Town. 2012 kawas, Arquette ru guest msqun mhtuw Cougar Town. qnxan nya 1999 kawas 6 byacing 12 ryax, Arquette ru Arquette Courteney Cox kekong la.maki qutux kneril laqi Coco Arquette,htgan maki 2004. Jennifer Aniston ga hiya Coco yaki.2012 kawas 6 byacing ini qutux ngasal,suruw lga kmal Arquette likong la.likong maki 2013 kawas 5 byacing,Arquette t'ring ru Christina McLarty 約會, 2013 kawas 11 byacing, hiya ga 迎來 te qutux laqi. 2014 kawas,Christina htgan mlikuy laqi. 2014 kawas 7 byacing,wal tekong la.2015 kawas 4 byacing 12 ryax,hiya ga wal pinsqunan la.htuw te sazing mlikuy Christina nya. 2011 kawas 1 byacing 1 ryax,Arquette musa qakiy 康復中心 quo na zyaw. 2012 kawas 6 byacing,Arquette mhtuw Trippin mqas na mrkyas maki Israel. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *a*i* arquette kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *a*i* arquette, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxam na s~ɕraral arquette ħtɣan βeħ βenton*ille *irɣinia* na s~ɕuβu*.ħija ɣa s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj,mjaɣi ru mqwas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕij. arquette jaβa(ʦ~ʨli** arquette) ɣa qutux s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj. ħija jaja ɣa jutaj lamu nja,kaħul polan* ŋas~ɕal. jaβa ɣa arʦ~ʨouet lalu nja. ʦ~ʨipoq kaħul *renʦ~ʨħ-ʦ~ʨana*ian ramu.arquette ʦ~ʨjux pajat ts~ɕwe ros~ɕanna ,riʦ~ʨħmon*,patriʦ~ʨia ru alexis~ɕ ħɣa ɣa s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj.arquette jaβa ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux maniq iju. jaja ɣa mħuqli ɣaŋ βuβu . pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja arquette mħtuw ʦ~ʨiŋaj eɣa maki **** kawas~ɕ, βu**j tħe *ampire s~ɕlajer *******(****),airħea*s~ɕ **(****) ru ne*er βeen kis~ɕs~ɕe* *****(****). ħija mħtuw βlos~ɕs~ɕom(****),βe*erlj ħills~ɕ,***** (****) ru *rien*s~ɕ(****) teli*i. **** kawas~ɕ,ps~ɕiβaj te qutux eɣa,ms~ɕtnaq ** βes~ɕ nja ʦ~ʨourtenej ʦ~ʨox .ħija ɣa kekoŋ maki **** kawas~ɕ.ms~ɕqun mħtuw kʔko kʔlʔ ** maki **** kawas~ɕ. ru ** kos~ɕi,qani kos~ɕi maki ʦ~ʨiŋaj eɣa ru teli*i.ru *ais~ɕj *oes~ɕ amerika,*irt ru ʦ~ʨouɣar town. **** kawas~ɕ, arquette ru ɣues~ɕt ms~ɕqun mħtuw ʦ~ʨouɣar town. qnxan nja **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, arquette ru arquette ʦ~ʨourtenej ʦ~ʨox kekoŋ la.maki qutux kneril laqi ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨo arquette,ħtɣan maki ****. *enni*er anis~ɕton ɣa ħija ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨo jaki.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ini qutux ŋas~ɕal,s~ɕuruw lɣa kmal arquette likoŋ la.likoŋ maki **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,arquette tʔriŋ ru ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtina mʦ~ʨlartj **, **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, ħija ɣa ** te qutux laqi. **** kawas~ɕ,ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtina ħtɣan mlikuj laqi. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,wal tekoŋ la.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,ħija ɣa wal pins~ɕqunan la.ħtuw te s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtina nja. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,arquette mus~ɕa qakij **** quo na zjaw. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,arquette mħtuw trippin mqas~ɕ na mrkjas~ɕ maki is~ɕrael. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: David Arquette kawas tay 1971, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 9, David Arquette, squliq na Bunge'. qnxam na sraral Arquette htgan beh Bentonville Virginiav na Subud.hiya ga squilq na psibay,myagi ru mqwas na sinsiy. Arquette yaba(Cliff Arquette) ga qutux squilq na psibay. hiya yaya ga yutay lamu nya,kahul Poland ngasal. yaba ga Arcouet lalu nya. cipoq kahul French-Canadian ramu.Arquette cyux payat tswe Rosanna ,Richmond,Patricia ru Alexis hga ga squilq na psibay.Arquette yaba ga,cyux maniq iyu. yaya ga mhuqli gang bubu . pincyogan nya Arquette mhtuw cingay ega maki 1990 kawas, Buffy the Vampire Slayer 吸血鬼獵人巴菲(1992),Airheads 空頭(1994) ru Never Been Kissed 從未被親吻(1999). hiya mhtuw Blossom(1992),Beverly Hills,90210 (1992) ru Friends(1996) telivi. 1996 kawas,psibay te qutux ega,mstnaq 未來 bes nya Courteney Cox .hiya ga kekong maki 1999 kawas.msqun mhtuw k'ko k'l' 廣告 maki 2003 kawas. ru 成立 kosi,qani kosi maki cingay ega ru telivi.ru Daisy Does Amerika,Dirt ru Cougar Town. 2012 kawas, Arquette ru guest msqun mhtuw Cougar Town. qnxan nya 1999 kawas 6 byacing 12 ryax, Arquette ru Arquette Courteney Cox kekong la.maki qutux kneril laqi Coco Arquette,htgan maki 2004. Jennifer Aniston ga hiya Coco yaki.2012 kawas 6 byacing ini qutux ngasal,suruw lga kmal Arquette likong la.likong maki 2013 kawas 5 byacing,Arquette t'ring ru Christina McLarty 約會, 2013 kawas 11 byacing, hiya ga 迎來 te qutux laqi. 2014 kawas,Christina htgan mlikuy laqi. 2014 kawas 7 byacing,wal tekong la.2015 kawas 4 byacing 12 ryax,hiya ga wal pinsqunan la.htuw te sazing mlikuy Christina nya. 2011 kawas 1 byacing 1 ryax,Arquette musa qakiy 康復中心 quo na zyaw. 2012 kawas 6 byacing,Arquette mhtuw Trippin mqas na mrkyas maki Israel. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *a*i* arquette kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *a*i* arquette, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxam na s~ɕraral arquette ħtɣan βeħ βenton*ille *irɣinia* na s~ɕuβu*.ħija ɣa s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj,mjaɣi ru mqwas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕij. arquette jaβa(ʦ~ʨli** arquette) ɣa qutux s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj. ħija jaja ɣa jutaj lamu nja,kaħul polan* ŋas~ɕal. jaβa ɣa arʦ~ʨouet lalu nja. ʦ~ʨipoq kaħul *renʦ~ʨħ-ʦ~ʨana*ian ramu.arquette ʦ~ʨjux pajat ts~ɕwe ros~ɕanna ,riʦ~ʨħmon*,patriʦ~ʨia ru alexis~ɕ ħɣa ɣa s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj.arquette jaβa ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux maniq iju. jaja ɣa mħuqli ɣaŋ βuβu . pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja arquette mħtuw ʦ~ʨiŋaj eɣa maki **** kawas~ɕ, βu**j tħe *ampire s~ɕlajer *******(****),airħea*s~ɕ **(****) ru ne*er βeen kis~ɕs~ɕe* *****(****). ħija mħtuw βlos~ɕs~ɕom(****),βe*erlj ħills~ɕ,***** (****) ru *rien*s~ɕ(****) teli*i. **** kawas~ɕ,ps~ɕiβaj te qutux eɣa,ms~ɕtnaq ** βes~ɕ nja ʦ~ʨourtenej ʦ~ʨox .ħija ɣa kekoŋ maki **** kawas~ɕ.ms~ɕqun mħtuw kʔko kʔlʔ ** maki **** kawas~ɕ. ru ** kos~ɕi,qani kos~ɕi maki ʦ~ʨiŋaj eɣa ru teli*i.ru *ais~ɕj *oes~ɕ amerika,*irt ru ʦ~ʨouɣar town. **** kawas~ɕ, arquette ru ɣues~ɕt ms~ɕqun mħtuw ʦ~ʨouɣar town. qnxan nja **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, arquette ru arquette ʦ~ʨourtenej ʦ~ʨox kekoŋ la.maki qutux kneril laqi ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨo arquette,ħtɣan maki ****. *enni*er anis~ɕton ɣa ħija ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨo jaki.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ini qutux ŋas~ɕal,s~ɕuruw lɣa kmal arquette likoŋ la.likoŋ maki **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,arquette tʔriŋ ru ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtina mʦ~ʨlartj **, **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, ħija ɣa ** te qutux laqi. **** kawas~ɕ,ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtina ħtɣan mlikuj laqi. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,wal tekoŋ la.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,ħija ɣa wal pins~ɕqunan la.ħtuw te s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtina nja. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,arquette mus~ɕa qakij **** quo na zjaw. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,arquette mħtuw trippin mqas~ɕ na mrkjas~ɕ maki is~ɕrael. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
